867 DOWN_DPRSD_CD DOWN_DPRSD_CD D0150B1 Mood: Feeling down, depressed, or hopeless: Pres CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident, over the past two weeks, has felt down, depressed, or hopeless. 0=No
1=Yes
9=No response effective 10/01/2023
